pkgmetadata.longdescription: nvidia-cublas-cu12 ships the NVIDIA cuBLAS / cuBLASLt shared libraries and headers as a Python wheel. It is a build/runtime dependency of dev-python/torch and other CUDA 12.x stacks. The wheel is python-version-agnostic and contains a single manylinux x86_64 binary payload; no compilation occurs locally. Licensed under the NVIDIA CUDA EULA; not redistributable via Gentoo mirrors.
